title: Oddisee & Heno. Announce New Album From Takoma With Love: Hear “MIMS”
author: Tom Breihan
summary:

Next month, he’ll team up with Heno., a relatively new rapper from Takoma Park, Maryland, to release a new album called From Takoma With Love. Oddisee is based in Brooklyn these…

The post Oddisee & Heno. Announce New Album <em>From Takoma With Love</em>: Hear “MIMS” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
The veteran rapper/producer Oddisee has been making beautiful music for a very long time now. Last year, he released an EP called En Route. Next month, he'll team up with Heno., a relatively new rapper from Takoma Park, Maryland, to release a new album called From Takoma With Love. Oddisee is based in Brooklyn these days, but like Heno., he grew up Washington, DC's Maryland suburbs, and Heno. says that the album is "dedicated to the home that raised me."

Heno. is new to me, but he and Oddisee teamed up for a single called "Integrity" last year. Oddisee produced all of From Takoma With Love, and his beat for lead single "MIMS" is awfully lush and jazzy. It's cool to hear someone approach a track like that with a singsong bounce-flow, and Oddisee has a great verse of his own, too. Below, check out "MIMS" (which may or may not be named after the guy who made "This Is Why I'm Hot") and the From Takoma With Love tracklist. 

TRACKLIST:
01 "Dear Younger Me"
02 "Trish Status"
03 "No Sleep" (feat. Kaléra)
04 "MIMS"
05 "Right Steps"
06 "Good Habits"
07 "Woe Is Me"
08 "Hard To See"
09 "Say More" (feat. Mad Keys)
10 "Round The Way"
11 "Can't Look Back"
12 "Guiding Me" (feat. Zaïna)

From Takoma With Love is out 4/30 on Outer Note.
